2605.13511.title: Many-Shot CoT-ICL: Making In-Context Learning Truly Learn
2605.13511.paper_summary: In-context learning (ICL) adapts large language models (LLMs) to new tasks by conditioning on demonstrations in the prompt without parameter updates. With long-context models, many-shot ICL can use dozens to hundreds of examples and achieve performance comparable to fine-tuning, yet current understanding of its scaling behavior is largely derived from non-reasoning tasks. We study many-shot chain-of-thought in-context learning (CoT-ICL) for reasoning and show that standard many-shot rules do not transfer. Across non-reasoning and reasoning-oriented LLMs and across non-reasoning and reasoning tasks, we find: (i) a setting-dependent scaling effect, where increasing the number of CoT demonstrations is unstable for non-reasoning LLMs and benefits mainly reasoning-oriented LLMs; (ii) similarity-based retrieval helps on non-reasoning tasks but fails on reasoning, since semantic similarity poorly predicts procedural (i.e., CoT) compatibility; and (iii) an order-scaling effect, where performance variance grows with more CoT demonstrations. We interpret these behaviors by viewing many-shot CoT-ICL as in-context test-time learning rather than scaled pattern matching, and suggests two principles: (i) demonstrations should be easy for the target model to understand, and (ii) they should be ordered to support a smooth conceptual progression. Guided by the principle, we propose Curvilinear Demonstration Selection (CDS), a simple ordering method that yields up to a 5.42 percentage-point gain on geometry with 64 demonstrations. Overall, our results reframe the long context window from a retrieval buffer into a structured curriculum for in-context test-time learning.
2605.13511.paper_summary_zh: 在上下文學習（ICL）中，通過在提示中條件化示範來適應大型語言模型（LLMs）以應對新任務，而無需更新參數。對於長上下文模型，多示範 ICL 可以使用數十到數百個示例，並達到與微調相當的性能，但目前對其擴展行為的理解主要來自非推理任務。我們研究了推理的多示範思維鏈上下文學習（CoT-ICL），並顯示標準的多示範規則無法轉移。在非推理和推理導向的 LLM 以及非推理和推理任務中，我們發現：（i）一種設定依賴的擴展效應，增加 CoT 示範的數量對於非推理 LLM 來說是不穩定的，主要受益於推理導向的 LLM；（ii）基於相似性的檢索在非推理任務中有幫助，但在推理中失敗，因為語義相似性無法良好預測程序（即 CoT）相容性；（iii）一種順序擴展效應，隨著更多 CoT 示範的增加，性能變異性增長。我們通過將多示範 CoT-ICL 視為上下文測試時學習而非擴展模式匹配來解釋這些行為，並提出兩個原則：（i）示範應該易於目標模型理解，以及（ii）它們應該有序以支持平滑的概念進展。在這一原則的指導下，我們提出了曲線演示選擇（CDS），這是一種簡單的排序方法，在 64 個示範中可在幾何學上獲得高達 5.42 個百分點的增益。總體而言，我們的結果將長上下文窗口重新構建為一個結構化的課程，用於上下文測試時學習。
2605.13511.author: Tsz Ting Chung et.al.
2605.13511.authors: Tsz Ting Chung, Lemao Liu, Mo Yu, Dit-Yan Yeung
